deviations.description: The modality has changed from permission to obligation, requiring the process to always ask for consent before retrieving personal data. The process model on page 1 shows that the phone company requests personal data from the customer before asking for consent, which directly violates the new obligation.

The compliance pattern has changed from merely allowing the existence of 'ask for consent' to mandating that 'ask consent' must precede 'retrieve personal data'. The process model does not enforce this order, as 'Request personal data' occurs before 'Ask for consent', resulting in a violation of the new requirement.
process_model_reference: Request personal data, Ask for consent

deviations.description: The activities have been modified to explicitly require 'ask consent' to occur before 'retrieve personal data'. The process model retrieves personal data without first asking for consent, which fails to comply with the updated activity sequence.
process_model_reference: Request personal data, Ask for consent
